title: Status notification based upon submitted status not changed status
excerpt:
I have a process in which a Team Leader (TL) submits a work form daily.   The TL declares within the form a status of the team - Red, Amber, Green. 
I can get a notification to work if the submitted status changes within…

posts.author: Mattieuk (Matt Hardy)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a process in which a Team Leader (TL) submits a work form daily. The TL declares within the form a status of the team - Red, Amber, Green.

I can get a notification to work if the submitted status changes within board but I cant get a notification to work if the submitted status is Red.

E.g If the new item status = Red notify ???

Any help ideas would be great

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Matt,

Have you tried to set up a custom automation like this?

Screen Shot 2023-08-07 at 2.07.01 pm762×570 23.7 KB

When the form is submitted, based on the status set (i.e. RED), you can then notify the relevant team member… Is this along the lines of what you’re looking for?

posts.author: Mattieuk (Matt Hardy)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks that great. Exactly what i was looking for.
